ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the financial instrument during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the financial instrument during the trading day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the financial instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data (1-100) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial instrument is traded */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in volume compared to the previous day */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the financial instrument */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the financial instrument details were last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial instrument (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source details were last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user details were last updated */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_lockout" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was locked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (comma-separated list) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the role details were last updated */,
  "description_updated" TEXT /* Description of the role, updated for clarity or changes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device accessing the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transformations" (
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data transformation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data record being transformed */,
  "transformation_type" TEXT /* Type of transformation (e.g., normalization, smoothing) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the transformation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transformation was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transformation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transformation (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the transformation details were last updated */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the transformation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transformations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transformations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the version details were last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integration */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., API, file upload) */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the integration was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the integration */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the integration details were last updated */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news item */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news item */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the news item was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news item */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news (e.g., earnings, economic, political) */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the news item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert details were last updated */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report details were last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction (0-1) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction details were last updated */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the model details were last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model, updated for clarity or changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the preference (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
